title: VACCINES AND IMMUNIZATION - 211info
text: DESCHUTES COUNTY PUBLIC HEALTH VACCINES AND IMMUNIZATION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides childhood immunizations and some adult immunizations. Offers influenza (flu) vaccines as they become available each season, along with vaccine information. 2577 NE Courtney Drive Bend, OR 97701 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-noon and 1pm-5pm Email (541) 322-7499 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 322-7499 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information and to schedule an appointment FEES: ccepts OHP and most private insurance, sliding scale fees offered to uninsured patients. No child will be turned away for inability to pay. DOCUMENTS: Immunization record and insurance information, if available LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Deschutes County Services: Childhood Immunization Flu Vaccines Vaccine Information Other Services Offered At This Location: HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - HARM REDUCTION PROGRAM HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - HIV/AIDS CASE MANAGEMENT HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - OREGON MOTHERSCARE AND PERINATAL CARE COORDINATION INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - BABIES FIRST! INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - CACOON INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - FAMILY CONNECTS PUBLIC ASSISTANCE PROGRAMS - WOMEN, INFANTS, AND CHILDREN SUPPLEMENTAL NUTRITION PROGRAM PUBLIC HEALTH - COMMUNICABLE DISEASE PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. DESCHUTES COUNTY PUBLIC HEALTH
